keynotes.text: Text Book of Materia Medica. By Adolph Lippe, M. D. Professor of Materia Medica at the Homopathic College of Pennsylvania. Presented by Médi-T. Cubebs (Cubebæ). Mind and Disposition. Exaltation of temper and of the mental faculties. Stool and Anus. Diarrha, with rumbling and cutting in the abdomen and burning in the rectum. Suppuration of the rectum. Burning and itching of the anus. Urinary Organs. [5] Foaming urine. Burning and itching in the fossa navicularis. Sexual Organs. Discharge from the urethra of a dark-reddish color (gonorrha). Inflammation of the penis. Sensation of pressure and heaviness in the pelvis. Extremities. [10] Sensation of heat in the palms of the hands and soles of the feet. Copyright © Médi-T 2006
